title: Studio Roadmap
content_html:
Studio Roadmap

Studio roadmap items change local authoring, catalogue maintenance, or reusable creative workspaces.

Features

  • Moments Composition Workspace — proposed text-first composition environment, beginning with the word-axis editor and growing through proven vertical deliveries.

Sequence

ID status delivery depends on
MCW-01 proposed basic axis editor existing visual proof
MCW-02 future text editor, live axis preview, settings, and reliable workspace restoration MCW-01
MCW-03 future second contrasting engine through a proven first-party engine boundary MCW-02
MCW-04 future durable recipes and reproducible DOM or static publication MCW-03
MCW-05 future one useful data-led composition MCW-04
MCW-06 future explicit generated-image and managed-media workflow MCW-04

No Studio feature delivery is active. Small Studio fixes and maintenance continue directly through their current code and durable documentation owners.

Add a feature here when it has a coherent Studio outcome that needs concept, architecture, or delivery material beyond a direct change.
